notes: Events are purchased from the shop and queued — they fire at the START of the NEXT season, not immediately. Each event is consumed on purchase (one-time use). 'effect_type' determines which handler in events.py runs. 'effect_params' passes data to that handler.

events.name: Viral Cold Open
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +250 lifetime views added directly to your total. Views count toward your quota milestone. A clip blew up before the show even aired. The algorithm chose you. Temporarily.

events.name: Surprise Sponsorship
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +$30 added directly to budget. Budget is used to buy shows, stars, ads, upgrades, and events. A mysterious corporation liked your lineup. Don't ask why. Just cash the check.

events.name: Midseason Retool
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: All scheduled shows lose 1 age point (minimum age 1). Lower age = higher views: shows peak at age 2 (x1.25 views), decay to x0.45 at age 7+. Restores momentum to aging shows.

events.name: Pilot Panic
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: The shop is refreshed for free. Normally rerolling costs $3 and rises $1 each use, resetting each season. This bypasses that cost entirely. The development slate was scrapped. Again.

events.name: Focus Group Frenzy
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: All scheduled shows permanently gain +40 Base Views. Base Views are the foundation of a show's rating before stars, ads, age, and slot modifiers are applied. This boost is permanent.

events.name: Sweeps Crossover
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: All scheduled shows permanently gain +50 Base Views. Stacks with Focus Group Frenzy and other base view boosts. Two universes collide. Fans lose their minds. Advertisers gain revenue.

events.name: Ratings Hotline
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +$20 budget AND +150 lifetime views. Budget spends immediately; views count toward your quota. Nielsen called. The numbers are in. They are good. Mostly.

events.name: Super Bowl Halftime Show
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +400 lifetime views AND +$35 budget. One of the largest view and budget bonuses available in the shop. The left shark is back. Nobody knows why. Everyone is watching.

events.name: Moon Landing Broadcast (1969)
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +500 lifetime views — the single largest view bonus in the game. Views count directly toward your quota milestone. One small step, one giant rating. Every television in America is on.

events.name: Writers' Strike 2007
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +$40 budget BUT all scheduled shows permanently lose -20 Base Views (minimum 10). Tradeoff: emergency cash now at the cost of long-term ratings. The scripted drama is now unscripted.

events.name: FCC Investigation
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: All scheduled shows permanently reduce upkeep by $2 (minimum $0). Upkeep is deducted from income each season — reducing it improves your net income. The lawyers arrived faster.

events.name: Series Finale Event
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: Your OLDEST scheduled show ages +1 season but generates +200 lifetime views immediately. High-risk move: aging accelerates decay (shows at age 7+ earn only x0.45 views). A farewell tour.

events.name: Nationwide Taste Test
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +$25 budget AND +200 lifetime views. A live cooking segment goes viral. Viewers tune in expecting disaster. The food is actually good. Everyone is confused but watching.

events.name: Celebrity Chef Meltdown
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: All scheduled shows permanently gain +35 Base Views. Base Views are calculated before star bonuses, ad bonuses, age decay, and slot modifiers. A meltdown raises all boats.

events.name: Streaming Rights Auction
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +$50 added directly to budget. One of the largest pure budget bonuses available. A streaming platform wants your back catalog. Cash upfront, no questions. What they stream is not your concern.

events.name: The Clip That Went Everywhere
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +350 lifetime views added directly to your total. Views count toward your quota milestone. A twelve-second clip is now the internet's most-watched video of the week.

events.name: Advertiser Boycott
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: +$50 budget BUT all shows permanently lose -30 Base Views (minimum 10). High-value tradeoff: large cash injection but permanently lowers your shows' view ceiling. Use carefully.

events.name: Production Tax Incentive
events.desc: NEXT SEASON: All shows permanently reduce upkeep by $3 (minimum $0) AND you gain +$25 budget. Upkeep is paid each season from income — reducing it improves net income permanently. Film in a state that really wants you there.
